quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Ca.Docs: A transform operation that casts a column to a different type.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Cr.Docs: An operation that creates calculated columns. Columns created in one such operation form a lexical closure.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Fi.Docs: An operation that filters rows based on some condition.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Pr.Docs: An operation that projects columns. Operations that come after a projection can only refer to projected columns.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Re.Docs: An operation that renames a column.

quicksight.dataset.transformoperation.Ta.Docs: An operation that tags a column with additional information.
